title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Bangalore

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Bangalore
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
